# Copilot Instructions

- Keep the backend layered: controller, service, repository, entity, dto, exception, and config.
- Favor straightforward business logic and database-backed calculations.
- Preserve JWT authentication, role-based access control, validation, soft delete, and Swagger documentation.
- Avoid hardcoded sample data or unnecessary abstraction.
- Keep tests focused on service or controller behavior and update the README when the API changes.
